title: Tool Orchestration
description: Tool Orchestration is the "glue" that prevents agentic systems from becoming fragmented, unmanageable codebases. It is the layer between the LLM's intent and the tools that act on the world — responsible for dispatching tool calls, managing execution order (sequential vs parallel), propagating results between steps, and enforcing cost and turn limits.
when_to_use: Use this skill for tool orchestration tasks.
